title: (Set of 2 50cm Upcycled Grey Round Plastic Planter Flower Pot Nursery Planter Decorative Garden Container,Indoor & Outdoor Bonsai Plants, Aloe, Herb, Orchid and More Plants/Flowers
features: SET OF 2- 50Cm, This Upcycled Grey Round plastic plant pots, they can be co-ordinated and arranged to create a fantastic display of flowers and plants on a patio or decking area. The pots are also suitable for use indoors and are UK manufactured with a weather resistant plastic. Approximately 69 litres capacity.
Each pot comes with drainage holes cut in to the base. (please be aware that due to manufacturing differences these holes may need to be pushed through or may already be present)
A Traditional Planters Are Weather resistant and lightweight. Made In Uk: Made Form Plastic
Finding the perfect wall planter for your garden, porch, balcony, kitchen or anywhere else in or around your home and office is a breeze.
Perfect for holding household or garden plants as well as everyday household items. Dimensions: 50.00 x 50.00 x 40.00 cm
